title: Church Street Inn Historic Charleston, an Ascend Collection Hotel
description: Timeshare hotel offering homey 1- and 2-bedroom units with cable TV & Wi-Fi, plus a courtyard.
hotelDescription:
This timeshare hotel in the city's historic Market Street District is a 3-minute walk from the Charleston City Market, a 5-minute walk from the Gibbes Museum of Art and a 9-minute walk from Waterfront Park.
 The refined 1- to 2-bedroom townhouses feature homey furnishings and wood floors, plus living areas and full kitchens. Modern touches include air-conditioning, cable TV and free Wi-Fi.
 The property offers an elegant foyer and lobby, a private cocktail lounge and a courtyard with a fountain. parking is offered for a fee. There are several shops and restaurants within walking distance.
